description: Schema for a completed invoice line item. The agent should produce output conforming to this structure.

site_id.description: Site identifier where work was performed (e.g. NPS-S1)

service_category.description: Service category from the contract (e.g. HVAC, Plumbing, Refrigeration)

description.description: Clear description of work performed, suitable for the invoice

hours_worked.description: Total hours worked, in increments matching the contract's minimum billing increment

rate_type.description: Which rate tier applies based on when the work was done

hourly_rate.description: Hourly rate applied, from the contract pricing

labor_cost.description: hours_worked * hourly_rate. For scheduled maintenance (FBL), use the fixed visit price for included hours.

materials.description: List of materials used. Empty array if no materials.

materials_cost.description: Sum of all material total_prices, WITH the contract's markup percentage applied

material_markup_percentage.description: The markup percentage from the contract (e.g. 15, 20, 10)

travel_cost.description: Travel cost. 0 if travel is included in the contract, flat fee if specified (e.g. FBL 45 EUR)

requires_approval.description: True if the invoice item exceeds a contract cost limit (e.g. GFS 500 EUR per-incident limit)

approval_reason.description: Reason approval is required. Only present if requires_approval is true.

certification_verified.description: True if the work required certification and the worker holds it. Null if no certification required.

validation_notes.description: Any warnings, flags, or notes from validation. E.g. 'Work performed outside contract service hours', 'Monthly maintenance already completed for this period'. Empty array if no issues.

example.description: Heat pump HP-3E not heating. Found faulty expansion valve. Replaced expansion valve, recharged refrigerant R-410A (2kg). System tested and operating normally.
